title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 137.535 - Assessor to make daily record of transfers of property
text:
137.535.  Assessor to make daily record of transfers of property. — It shall be the duty of the assessor to make a daily record of any transfers of any parcels of real estate recorded in the office of the recorder of deeds of such city and he shall correct or change his plat books and records accordingly.
(L. 1945 p. 1859 § 17)
